suspicious_activity.narrative: Tracy Lewis (ID: CUST_0053) conducted 94 transactions totaling $274,025.18 between the review period. Activity indicates structuring at Medium risk. Key indicators: 7 transactions in $8,000-$9,999 band, Aggregate total $274,025.18 across 94 transactions. Transactions lack clear economic purpose, consistent with suspicious activity under the Bank Secrecy Act, 31 CFR 1020.320.
key_indicators: Possible smurfing — deliberate sub-threshold structuring detected
